summary: Frontend visual regression testing of Pacfully image refresh + service anchor scroll + Explore More + theme toggle. All 10 review items PASSED visually and functionally.

issues: Electronics card uses photo-1518770660439-4636190af475 (the same Unsplash ID previously flagged as a 'sneaker/random tech workspace' image). User flagged Cosmetics/Fashion/Jewelry, but Electronics image may still feel non-packaging. Visually verify on the Electronics section if it shows packaging vs. a random tech workspace. NOT BLOCKING — outside the explicit review checklist.

critical_code_review_comments: data.js has duplicate Unsplash IDs across many entries (e.g. photo-1607082348824-0a96f2a4b9da reused for fmcg-monocartons + stickers + multiple finishes + offset + monocartons + design). Consider diversifying so adjacent pages don't show identical heroes/cards.
ProductCategory.jsx uses the static SUB_IMAGES array rotated by index — every category's first 4 sub-cards show the same 4 images. Functionally fine, but variety per category would feel more premium.
INDUSTRIES_DETAIL 'Electronics' still uses photo-1518770660439-4636190af475 which was historically flagged as non-packaging — consider replacing with a premium electronics-packaging shot.
Layout.jsx scrolls to top only when no hash — confirmed working; good.
Services.jsx anchor scroll uses 400ms setTimeout + smooth scroll with scroll-mt-28 offset — works correctly (verified: scrollY=2959, section.top=69.5).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend image-refresh PR fully verified. Visual checks confirmed: 1) Every product category page (/products/{slug}) renders SINGLE hero image (no 4-image collage) — hero_imgs_in_section=1 on all 8 categories. 2) Variants badge `N VARIANTS` visible on each hero (rigid-boxes=15, monocartons=18, labels=16, ecommerce=13, luxury-gift=12, etc.). 3) Hero images per page are premium/packaging-relevant: rigid-boxes=red gift box w/ twine, labels=pink cosmetic flat-lay, stickers/fmcg=red panels w/ strings, paper-bags=black box w/ ribbon (Gucci-style), ecommerce=kraft mailer boxes w/ gold foil, luxury-gift=red gift boxes w/ ribbon. NO phones, sneakers, Adobe UIs, wine stores, or apparel models observed in heroes or first 4 variant cards. 4) Industries page Cosmetics section uses premium pink flat-lay photo-1583209814683 ✅. 5) Service card click from Home (e.g. service-card-paper-bags) navigates to /services#service-paper-bags AND auto-smooth-scrolls to that section (verified: rect.top=69.5px below nav). 6) Explore More buttons present for ALL 8 productSlug services (rigid-box, corrugated, labels, stickers, paper-bags, ecommerce, luxury-gift, monocartons) and ABSENT for offset/design. Clicking service-explore-paper-bags navigates to /products/paper-bags. 7) Theme toggle (data-testid=theme-toggle) toggles html.class between '' (dark) and 'light', persisted via localStorage key 'pacfully-theme' — survives page reload. Light theme renders with good contrast. All 10 review checklist items verified PASS.
rca of the issue: N/A — no functional bugs found in this iteration.
